description: Style Note Super soft vintage leather and a variety of hues to choose from, wallets from fossil are the way to go for a look that chic and versatile effortlessly. Spice up your outfit with these funky yet conventional wallets and get ready to be on top of your game! Product Details Brown and black tri fold wallet with a flap and click clasp closure,  that has a zipped compartment, an inner pocket with four card holders on the left, two insert pockets with seven card holders and one id card holder on the right,  zipped pocket at the back, stitch detailing and brand name on the click closure Material and Care Vintage leather Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt Dimensions:10 cm x 20 cm
